chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. CP No.D-6550 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ For hearing of CMA No.3224/2025. 17.03.2025. Syed Hussain Shah, AAG Mr. Khalid Jan Baloch, S.E. Khairpur Irrigation Circle --------------- The applicant, official respondent number 1, seeks de-sealing of the subject property and hand over of the same, by the Additional Registrar Sukkur Bench, to the Chief Engineer Sukkur, Barrage Left Bank Region Sukkur. Notice of the application was issued and no opposition thereto has been received. In view of the grounds articulated in the memorandum of affidavit, especially paragraphs 5, 6 and 7 thereof, coupled with the arguments of the learned AAG, the application is allowed in terms that the subject property is ordered to be de-sealed and the possession thereof be restored to the concerned department. JUDGE JUDGE JUDGE
